description:
Atlas demo gallery вҖ” 12 pre-lifted 3D scenes spanning 4 thesis patterns: (1) Generator-S scatter (1 prompt вҶ’ N instances; carrier/cathedral/forest/coastal/village), (2) atmospheric / 1-primitive scenes (open-ocean/snow-mountain), (3) GPU-internal SDF rep distinct from generator-level scatter (canal-day1), (4) single-object precision (vase/clock/bicycle/dining). Each demo proves a specific claim in the vs-diffusion / vs-neural-world-model thesis.

PROMPT-WRITING LESSON (learned 2026-05-18 the hard way): keep prompts SHORT. The LLM has cultural / visual priors (e.g. 'дёӯеӣҪиҲӘжҜҚ' вҶ’ иҫҪе®Ғ/зҰҸе»әеҸ· with starboard island, 3/4 angle). Heavy 'prompt engineering' with explicit angle / parts list overrides those priors and produces worse compositions. Trust the model.

demos.title: зӣҶжҷҜиҡҖеҲ»еұұең°
demos.thesisPoint: Sprint 12 (Rune Skovbo Johansen Advanced Terrain Erosion Filter, MPL-2.0) вҖ” Atlas's first CPU-baked-heightmap-to-GPU-texture pipeline. compile() bakes a 512ВІ heightmap (height + ridgeMap + treeAmount + erosionOffset packed into RGBA32F) via Phacelle noise + 5-octave erosion, uploaded to flyLambert as sampler2D u_heightmap. New material kind='eroded-terrain' (kind=7) renders cliff/dirt/grass/snow/sand/tree/drainage by reading the 4 channels. Hash-driven (?tokenHash=0x... or scene.defaults.seed): different hashes produce visually distinct mountains via 1-3 random initial bumps + 6 jittered visual erosion params + per-hash Phacelle domain offset. NFT-ready primitive вҖ” Phase 2 adds Blueprint + BOB GPU views for the on-chain generative art triple-view product.
demos.prompt: зӣҶжҷҜејҸиҡҖеҲ»еұұең°

demos.title: Venice Canal
demos.thesisPoint: Two layers of 1вҶ’N: GPU-internal `rep` (canal buildings tiled along curve, 0 scene-tree expansion) vs Generator-S scatter (instances become separate subjects). This demo shows the former вҖ” rep + curve as procedural urban density.
demos.prompt: ејҜжӣІж°ҙйҒ“ + жӢұжЎҘ + дә®зӘ—

demos.title: зәўеІ©еіЎи°·В·й»„жҳҸ
demos.thesisPoint: terrain-canyon primitive (recipe-only IQ Canyon XdsXDS port) adds 3D fbm displacement overlay with Y-axis stretch 4Г— onto terrain-elevated heightmap вҖ” horizontal noise bands map to VERTICAL wall striations, the signature red sandstone canyon look. Mountain branch now respects material HSV hue as a rock tint (Sprint A5), so the same shader renders gray Alps OR red sandstone via material setting. Sunset lighting + god-rays + warm fog.
demos.prompt: еӨ•йҳізәўеІ©еіЎи°·

demos.title: дёӯеӣҪиҲӘз©әжҜҚиҲ°
demos.thesisPoint: #1 precision В· regression test
demos.prompt: дёҖиүҳдёӯеӣҪзҡ„иҲӘз©әжҜҚиҲ°

demos.title: йғҪеёӮеӨ©йҷ…зәҝ
demos.thesisPoint: Sprint A7 (Otavio Good Skyline CC0 recipe port) вҖ” Atlas's first procedural-scene primitive (procedural-city). Infinite tiled skyscrapers via per-block hash + downtown bias + window-aligned floor quantization. Requires new voxel-walk raymarch (flyLambert clamps step to unit block boundaries when scene has city, otherwise sphere trace overshoots discontinuous per-block SDF). New material kind='building' (kind=6) renders procedural window grid + Schlick glass reflection + lane-marking road texture.
demos.prompt: йғҪеёӮеӨ©йҷ…зәҝ

demos.title: жҲҳжңәе·ЎиҲӘ
demos.thesisPoint: Sprint 1-8 capability convergence В· full MttGz4 jet-fighter cinematic reconstruction using Atlas SceneData primitives only. HDR + DoF + motion blur + lens flare + IBL + cameraSequence + subjectMotion + attachTo + pos.relativeTo + shake.velocityScale + Blueprint-as-shot + exposure ramps. Hand-authored counterpart to rocket-launch вҖ” proves the cinematic envelope generalizes from vertical-launch to horizontal-cruise subjects.
demos.prompt: дёҖжһ¶е·ЎиҲӘдёӯзҡ„жҲҳж–—жңә

demos.title: ж№–еҢәдҝҜзһ°
demos.thesisPoint: Recipe-only port of IQ Rainforest envelope() вҖ” terrain-with-lakes primitive carves lake-floor pockets into elevated-terrain heightfield using low-freq mask noise. Lakes are PART of the terrain (continuous Lipschitz), so ridges + valleys form naturally around them. Paired with sea-surface for actual water plane + Sprint A4 snow Schlick + Fresnel rim for crystalline alpine look. Aerial cinematic 4-shot showcase.
demos.prompt: ж№–е…үеұұиүІ

demos.prompt: ејҖйҳ”зҡ„жө·йқў

demos.prompt: Presentation slide 0: "3D SPHERES". A chart of 3 percentage values (20%, 40%, 80%). Geometric, axis-aligned. In 3D, lift to a clean bar/column chart on a stage with the title floating above вҖ” corporate keynote aesthetic, not naturalistic.

demos.title: йӣЁжһ—еұұеІӯ
demos.thesisPoint: Sprint A6 (recipe-only IQ Rainforest XlsBR4) вҖ” adds 5 mountain shader idioms in one batch: (1) cliff smoothstep injection (terrain-elevated new args, structural rock faces) (2) canopy mosaic (per-cell hash variation, distant terrain reads as dense tree canopy) (3) wavelength-dependent fog (RGB different extinction, distant terrain desaturates + blue) (4) cliff bump (fbm normal perturbation masked by 1-|n.y|) (5) cloud shadow projection (projected noise density gives dappled forest light). All backward-compat вҖ” existing scenes unchanged.
demos.prompt: йӣЁжһ—еұұеІӯ

demos.title: зҒ«з®ӯеҸ‘е°„
demos.thesisPoint: Sprint 1 cinematic showcase В· HDR bloom on engine glow + DoF + lens flare + ACES tonemap. Inspired by MttGz4 jet sequence; built on the same Atlas primitives as every other demo. Proves the cinematic post-FX layer translates without changing the SDF authoring path.
demos.prompt: дёҖжһҡжӯЈеңЁеҚҮз©әзҡ„зҒ«з®ӯ

demos.title: йӣӘиҰҶзҹіжЎҘ
demos.thesisPoint: First parametric building atom В· arch-bridge SDF (recipe-only IQ MdXGzr port) builds vault + deck + rails + ~50 balusters + corner finials in ONE 100-LOC SDF function (vs ~60 unioned subjects = 10Г— perf). Pair with new material kind='snowy' = Lambert + noise-patched snow overlay + cosine micro-normal sparkle spec. Snow demo composes arch-bridge + terrain-elevated (snowy peaks) + tree-pine scatter вҖ” proves parametric building primitives integrate with existing atom composition.
demos.prompt: йӣӘиҰҶзҹіжЎҘ

demos.title: йӣӘеұұ
demos.thesisPoint: Pure procedural В· 1 SDF primitive (terrain-heightmap, IQ Elevated fbm) = full mountain range with snow-line shading. Zero LLM-emit subjects; the shader IS the scene.
demos.prompt: йӣӘеұұе…ЁжҷҜ

demos.prompt: дёҖеҸӘиҠұз“¶

demos.title: еӨҚеҸӨиҮӘиЎҢиҪҰ
demos.thesisPoint: #1 precision-content
demos.prompt: дёҖиҫҶеӨҚеҸӨиҮӘиЎҢиҪҰ

demos.title: Wave 1-extruded typography
demos.thesisPoint: Atlas typography Wave 1-extruded atom showcase. Same 16 glyphs as Wave 1-pipe but rendered as 2D outlines extruded along Z (flat faces, sharp edges). Side-by-side with wave-1-pipe-showcase = visual proof of the extruded vs pipe atom dichotomy.
demos.prompt: Wave 1-extruded atom showcase

demos.title: Wave 1-pipe typography
demos.thesisPoint: Atlas typography Wave 1-pipe atom showcase вҖ” 16 glyphs (digits + KPI symbols) rendered as true 3D capsule/torus/sphere unions, not extruded 2D outlines. Demonstrates the architectural distinction (text-3d-pipe vs text-3d-extruded) shipped 2026-06-19.
demos.prompt: Wave 1-pipe atom showcase вҖ” all 16 supported glyphs in true 3D pipe style
